block_03: You have fulfilled the conditions of our lottery — reached the $10 turnover at least once during the day. You are now automatically entered into the raffle for a chance to win.
block_05: The winning ticket will be selected at random at 10 am.
block_06: The results of the  draw will be sent to you along with a screencast.
